pageContext.name: Mumbo Jumbo
pageContext.description: Mumbo Jumbo is the Strongman, or in his case, bull of the Mob. This one-man-bull security detail is more than ready, willing, and able to muscle through any heist as cool as a cucumber, or if his forehead jewel turns red as angry as a steer and as large as a wrecking ball!  This 7 scale highly articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Mumbo Jumbo features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories suitable for this beefy part-bovine criminal. Given his penchant for charging around like a bull in a china shop, once you get this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure, choose wisely on where to display him.
